channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐘 yaojingang/GEOFlow (1553 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: yaojingang

📝 Repository: yaojingang/GEOFlow

📄 Descrizione: Open-source GEO content production system with AI tasks, review workflow, and publishing.

⭐ Stelle: 1553

🍴 Forks: 341

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: ai cms content-automation geo openai-compatible php postgresql seo

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-13T11:42:03Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-10T05:32:46Z

]]>

item.title: 🐘 aregowe/magento2-module-polyshell-protection (45 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: aregowe

📝 Repository: aregowe/magento2-module-polyshell-protection

📄 Descrizione: Comprehensive defense-in-depth Magento 2 module that closes the PolyShell unrestricted file upload vulnerability (APSB25-94) — blocking polyglot webshell uploads across eight interception layers including request path blocking, controller-level upload prevention, polyglot file detection, and framework-level image hardening.

⭐ Stelle: 45

🍴 Forks: 4

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: magento magento2 php php8 security

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-14T17:13:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-05T07:50:07Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: run-as-root

📝 Repository: run-as-root/magento-2-seeder

📄 Descrizione: Laravel-style database seeder for Magento 2 / Mage-OS. Generate realistic products (all types), categories, customers, orders (all states), CMS pages, and reviews via bin/magento db:seed.

⭐ Stelle: 35

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: dev-tools faker fixtures mage-os magento magento-module magento2 php seeder seeding test-data

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-01T09:28:00Z

]]>

item.title: 🐘 RomaLytar/yammi-jobs-monitoring-laravel (13 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: RomaLytar

📝 Repository: RomaLytar/yammi-jobs-monitoring-laravel

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight Laravel queue monitoring package that tracks job lifecycle (processing, success, failure) across any queue driver. It provides a simple UI, execution insights, real-time metrics, failure alerts via Slack/email, and supports retries with modified payloads.

⭐ Stelle: 13

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-11T13:24:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-29T07:52:44Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 mt8/orpharion (13 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mt8

📝 Repository: mt8/orpharion

📄 Descrizione: [WordPress Plugin] Track, score, quarantine, and clean orphaned wp_options rows. Identify stale plugin/theme settings with read-tracking and staleness scoring — safely test-delete with quarantine mode before committing.

⭐ Stelle: 13

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

📜 Licenza: No license
